福山有路勤为径，
 寿海无边乐开怀。
 笔墨纸胭添画卷，
 人文禅意喜春才。
 一年好景君须记，
 满院礼花臣拾来。
 紫燕归途青柳翠，
红联迎接彩门开。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770805551,"group_id":"7589890870183201817","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2+lACv2L5WqVTrXE6NvreE=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d6c20d30920d4b96959ee5b9a0225682~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789128&x-signature=XECiL0SoruAejfS20wQsoezPuBI%3D","user_id":"111125517050","user_name":"用户11112551"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111125517050","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589890870183201817","book_info":{"abstract":"平岗村风景美妙，女人们的身材更是一个比一个的漂亮。其中韩美香是这里最漂亮的女人。小伙子李二牛长得人高马大，一次意外，李二牛得到一个奇妙的机缘，同时也让李二牛和韩美香走到了一起…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/05c8f45dc949e06cc0066a39c1d63b7a","author":"徒步行者","author_id":"","book_id":"7589890870183201817","book_name":"我的乡村女人真快活","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#582008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9334人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chap
